title: Dickinson slant — 'the air holds its breath' (gate miss)
prompt: Free-verse poem in the Dickinson tradition: slant rhyme, en-dash mid-thought, anaphora.
constraint: Dickinson slant rhyme; one en-dash mid-line; anaphoric repetition of a body-noun.
notes: Phase 7 cascade output for poetry_gen p07 — selected as a *teachable miss*. The vimarśa event did not fire, but the shadow revision (0.567) clearly beat the draft (0.504). This is exactly the calibration gap H8b documents: the event_gated commit policy under-fires on this domain. The H8c leaderboard's verdict that always_revise out-performs event_gated is driven by items like this.
